name: MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card
exclusions: Personal loan transactions on the card
milestoneBenefits: Upgrade to a higher MMTBLACK membership tier on spending Rs 2 Lakhs or more on MakeMyTrip annually
additionalBenefits: Unlimited myCash rewards that never expire
Up to 6% myCash on MakeMyTrip hotel bookings and 3% on flight bookings
Joining and annual renewal vouchers worth Rs 1,000
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge accesses and 1 complimentary international airport lounge access per year
additionalDetails: Complimentary domestic lounge access (capped at 2 visits per quarter) requires a minimum spend of Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
Complimentary international lounge access (1 visit per calendar year) requires Priority Pass membership.
myCash rewards do not expire and can be redeemed at Rs 1 per myCash on the MakeMyTrip platform.
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank MakeMyTrip Credit Card product page.
Annual fee of Rs 999 is waived on spending Rs 3 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Complimentary domestic lounge access (8 visits per year, max 2 per quarter) requires spending Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
